governing_law.value: Laws of the State of New York
governing_law.exact_text: The validity, construction and performance of this Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

audit_rights.value: Lucent has the right to inspect mPhase's Approved Uses bearing the Lucent Co-Branding Logo.
audit_rights.exact_text: mPhase agrees to allow Lucent to inspect the Approved Uses bearing the Lucent Co-Branding Logo, to ensure that those uses reviewed and approved pursuant to the procedure set forth in Schedule B continue to be in compliance with the terms of this Agreement.

fields.liability_cap: Neither Party shall be liable to the other for special, incidental, or consequential damages
